## Pull Request Description

<!-- Describe your changes in detail here. -->

### CodeRabbit
This repository uses **CodeRabbit** for PR review and planning help.
- Leave a comment with `@coderabbitai review` for an incremental review.
- Leave a comment with `@coderabbitai full review` for a fresh review of the entire PR.
- Leave a comment with `@coderabbitai plan` when you want implementation planning help on the PR context.

### Gemini Code Assist on GitHub
This repository has **Gemini Code Assist on GitHub** integrated for AI-powered code reviews. We highly encourage using it to get immediate feedback and summarize your changes:
- Leave a comment with `/gemini summary` to post a summary of the changes in the pull request.
- Leave a comment with `/gemini review` to get an immediate, in-depth code review from Gemini.

### Checklist
- [ ] I have verified my changes locally with the relevant scoped checks (for example `terraform validate`, `opa test`, `helm lint`, or `pytest`).
- [ ] I have read the `CONTRIBUTING.md` guidelines.
- [ ] I have used at least one AI review surface (`/gemini review` or `@coderabbitai review`) when it was useful.
